description: Mapping of medical problems to Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS) and required user attributes. Synonyms are written in natural conversational phrasing to support semantic-similarity retrieval.

problems.description: Pain, stiffness, swelling, or restricted movement in joints such as knees, lower back, neck, or shoulders. Often worse in cold weather or in the morning.

exploitation_rules.check_vata_aggravation: If 'pain_quality' is 'Throbbing' or 'Moving', suspect Vata imbalance.

problems.description: Burning sensation in the chest or stomach, sour belching, acid reflux, or heartburn — typically aggravated by spicy/sour food, stress, or skipping meals.
synonyms: burning in the chest after eating
chest burns when I lie down

problems.description: Persistent cough lasting more than two weeks — may be dry, productive (with phlegm), or accompanied by chest tightness, sore throat, or congestion.

exploitation_rules.differentiate_type: If 'sputum_type' is 'Yellow/Green', suspect Pitta Kasa (Infection). If 'Dry', suspect Vata Kasa.

problems.description: Persistent worry, restlessness, racing thoughts, or panic — often accompanied by rapid pulse, shallow breathing, or digestive disturbance.

exploitation_rules.gut_brain_axis: Check 'bowel_movements' for Constipation (Vibandha), a common co-morbidity with Anxiety (Vata).

problems.description: Skin reactions including itching, redness, hives, eczema, or acne — often linked to diet incompatibilities, heat, or blood toxicity.

exploitation_rules.blood_purification: Check 'diet_type' for incompatible foods (Viruddha Ahara) that vitiate Rakta (Blood).

problems.description: Difficulty falling asleep, staying asleep, or waking up unrefreshed. Often linked to stress, irregular routine, or Vata aggravation.
synonyms: I keep waking up at night

exploitation_rules.vata_pacification: If user reports racing thoughts or restlessness with sleeplessness, treat as Vata-driven Anidra.
exploitation_rules.stress_link: Cross-check with stress_level — high stress is the most common driver.

problems.description: Infrequent, hard, or incomplete bowel movements with bloating or abdominal discomfort — a hallmark of Vata aggravation in the colon.
synonyms: haven't gone to the toilet in days

exploitation_rules.vata_in_colon: Constipation with dryness/gas indicates Vata in Pakvashaya — recommend warm fluids and oleation.

problems.description: Pain in the head — may be throbbing (Pitta), heavy/dull (Kapha), or sharp/migrating (Vata). Often triggered by stress, hunger, sun exposure, or sinus congestion.
synonyms: dull pain in the back of my head

exploitation_rules.differentiate_dosha: Throbbing/burning = Pitta; heavy/dull with congestion = Kapha; migrating/sharp = Vata.
exploitation_rules.check_digestion: Many headaches stem from Ama (toxins) — verify agni_state.

problems.description: Elevated blood pressure that may present with headaches, dizziness, palpitations, or simply be detected on measurement. Often tied to stress, salt, and Pitta-Vata aggravation.
synonyms: doctor said my BP is up

exploitation_rules.stress_axis: High stress_level + raised BP = Pitta-Vata aggravation; recommend cooling Pranayama.
exploitation_rules.lifestyle_check: Look for Smoking/Alcohol/Caffeine in addictions list.

problems.description: Excessive body fat, sluggish metabolism, heaviness after meals, lethargy, and Kapha dominance. Often associated with low Agni and sedentary lifestyle.

exploitation_rules.kapha_dominance: Low activity + Manda Agni + heaviness = classic Medoroga; emphasize Langhana and movement.

problems.description: Excessive shedding of hair, thinning, premature greying, or dandruff — may stem from Pitta excess, stress, poor nutrition, or scalp dryness.

exploitation_rules.pitta_link: Premature greying + scalp burning = Pitta in Kesha; recommend cooling oils.
exploitation_rules.stress_link: Sudden hair fall is frequently stress-driven — verify stress_level.

problems.description: Persistent tiredness, low energy, lack of motivation, weakness, or feeling drained even after rest — often a sign of Ojas depletion.

exploitation_rules.ojas_depletion: Low bala + poor sleep + low Agni = classic Bala Kshaya; recommend Rasayana therapy.

problems.description: Inflammation of the stomach lining causing burning pain in the upper abdomen, nausea, bloating, loss of appetite, and discomfort that worsens with spicy or sour food.
synonyms: pain that goes away after eating but comes back

exploitation_rules.stress_link: High stress + skipped meals = Pitta aggravation in Amashaya (stomach).
exploitation_rules.addictions_check: Smoking, alcohol, and caffeine consistently worsen gastritis.
exploitation_rules.h_pylori_flag: Recurring symptoms despite lifestyle correction warrant testing for H. pylori.

problems.description: Acute inflammation of the stomach and intestines causing diarrhea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, and weakness — typically triggered by contaminated food, cold exposure, or viral infection.
synonyms: ate something bad and now stomach hurts

exploitation_rules.ama_dominant: Acute onset after meals = Ama Visha (food toxin); start with rest and clear fluids.
exploitation_rules.red_flag: Persistent vomiting, bloody stool, or fever > 39°C requires medical care.

problems.description: Swollen veins around the anus causing pain, itching, bleeding (bright red blood on tissue or stool), and a tearing sensation during defecation. Often linked to chronic constipation, prolonged sitting, or low-fiber diet.
synonyms: itchy pain in the anal area
blood in stool but bright red

exploitation_rules.constipation_link: Chronic constipation is the leading cause; address bowel regularity first.
exploitation_rules.surgical_referral: Severe pain, large prolapse, or persistent heavy bleeding → consult for Kshara Sutra or surgical evaluation.

problems.description: Open sores in the stomach lining or upper small intestine causing burning pain (often relieved temporarily by eating but returning hours later), nausea, bloating, and sometimes black stools.
synonyms: burning pain that wakes me at night
stomach pain relieved after eating but returns
pain in upper abdomen with nausea

exploitation_rules.pitta_dominance: Burning pain + waking at night = Pitta-dominant Parinama Shoola.
exploitation_rules.medical_referral: Black/tarry stools or vomiting blood requires immediate medical attention.

problems.description: Functional bowel disorder with alternating constipation and diarrhea, abdominal cramps, bloating, and flatulence — often stress-aggravated and worsened by specific trigger foods.
synonyms: stomach hurts before bowel movement and feels better after

exploitation_rules.vata_pitta_grahani: Alternating bowel pattern with stress sensitivity = Vata-Pitta Grahani.
exploitation_rules.trigger_identification: Maintain a food diary to identify personal triggers.

problems.description: Frequent loose or watery stools, urgency, abdominal cramps, and dehydration risk — caused by infection, contaminated food, or Ama (digestive toxins).
synonyms: passing stool many times a day
urgent need to use the toilet

exploitation_rules.hydration_priority: Always restore fluids and electrolytes first; weakness = Ojas Kshaya risk.
exploitation_rules.medical_referral: Blood in stool, high fever, or diarrhea > 48 hours requires medical care.

problems.description: Discomfort, fullness, gas, belching, or heaviness after meals — caused by weak digestion (Manda Agni), incompatible food combinations, or eating in stressed states.

exploitation_rules.manda_agni: Heaviness + low appetite + bloating = Manda Agni; recommend Deepana-Pachana herbs.
exploitation_rules.incompatibility_check: Look for Viruddha Ahara (e.g. milk + fruit, fish + dairy).

problems.description: Feeling of queasiness or actual vomiting — may be triggered by spoiled food, anxiety, motion, hormonal changes, or upward movement of Pitta/Kapha.
synonyms: everything makes me want to retch

exploitation_rules.pitta_chhardi: Bitter/sour vomit with burning = Pitta Chhardi; cooling herbs recommended.
exploitation_rules.red_flag: Vomiting blood, severe headache, or persistent vomiting > 24 hours requires medical care.

problems.description: Acute upper respiratory infection with runny nose, sneezing, sore throat, body aches, mild fever, and fatigue — caused by exposure to cold, dampness, or viruses.
synonyms: fever with chills and body pain

exploitation_rules.kapha_dominant: Thick mucus + heaviness = Kapha-dominant Pratishyaya; warming spices recommended.
exploitation_rules.vata_dominant: Dry throat + body ache + chills = Vata-dominant; oleation and warmth recommended.
